```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement A/B testing for ML model comparison"
---
# ML A/B Testing
## Task
Implement A/B testing for ML model comparison in production.
## Requirements
1. Split traffic between model versions. 2. Define success metrics (accuracy, latency, engagement).
3. Run for statistically significant duration. 4. Implement guardrail metrics.
5. Automate winner selection.
## Constraints
- Minimum sample size for significance. Monitor guardrails throughout. Stop on regression.
## Success Criteria
- Models compared fairly. Statistical significance achieved. Winner promoted safely.
```
